raw_title: How Does GenAI “See” Climate Change: Exploring the Challenges and Opportunities of GenAI for Climate Visual Journalism
title_en: How Does GenAI “See” Climate Change: Exploring the Challenges and Opportunities of GenAI for Climate Visual Journalism
title_zh: 生成式人工智能如何“看待”气候变化：探索生成式人工智能在气候视觉新闻中的挑战与机遇
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨了生成式人工智能（GenAI）如何理解和呈现气候变化相关的视觉内容，以及它在气候视觉新闻领域带来的挑战和机遇。文章分析了AI生成图像在新闻报道中的潜在应用，同时讨论了相关的伦理和技术问题。
plain_summary_en: This research explores how generative AI (GenAI) understands and presents visual content related to climate change, and the challenges and opportunities it brings to climate visual journalism. The article analyzes the potential applications of AI-generated images in news reporting while discussing related ethical and technical issues.
research_direction_zh: 研究聚焦于人工智能技术在新闻可视化领域的应用，特别是生成式AI如何影响气候变化的视觉传播，探索技术创新与新闻伦理的交叉点。
research_direction_en: The research focuses on the application of AI technology in news visualization, particularly how generative AI impacts the visual communication of climate change, exploring the intersection of technological innovation and journalistic ethics.
